item.name: Wind-up Fourchenault
item.description:
Don't even think about dragging it into conflict, or it shall give you a look of sternest disapproval.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Fourchenault minion.
item.tooltip:
Gods know Fourchenault's a
cranky old goat, so I'm sure
you butt heads often enough.
   - Theopauldin
item.specialactiondescription:
Renders all allies within range immune to attacks by critters.
Duration: 5s
